content:
FINAL CLOSURE — NO MORE PARTIAL REPORTS

Complete the remaining blockers only.

1. Remove every remaining Rork SDK/package/configuration if it is not required at runtime.

2. Remove every EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_* variable that is no longer needed.

3. Reconcile project video counts until database, API, landing page, home feed, reels, and deal pages all return identical counts.

4. Fix rork.json/project configuration so the repository can be checked out independently.

5. Build the final production APK.

6. Perform a complete production regression.

7. Provide the final APK.

After that, the only remaining task should be Real Device QA.

Do NOT report VERIFIED until the Android QA checklist has been completed on a physical device.

Return:

• GitHub SHA
• Render Deploy ID
• Production SHA
• APK version
• Remaining blockers (if any)

If only Real Device QA remains, state exactly that.
